# cloudfly_instance_metrics (Data Source)

Gets metrics for a CloudFly instance.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) Instance ID.
- `metric_type` (String) Metric type. Valid values: `vcpu`, `memory`, `disk`, `interface`, `packet`.
- `start_time` (String) Time range. Valid values: `1h`, `2h`, `1d`, `7d`, `30d`.

### Read-Only

- `result` (String) Metrics data returned by the API (JSON).
